full_text:
Han Fu 韓福
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Han Fu (韓福). Governor of Luoyang, killed by Guan Yu while guarding the passes. Related to Wang Zhi. Han Fu is a fictional character. Han Fu was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Han Fu lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
